title: Brand voice guidance
content: Use concise, confident, benefit-led language. Avoid exaggerated claims. Focus on durability and convenience.

title: SEO drinkware guidance
content: Use keywords like insulated water bottle, stainless steel bottle, reusable bottle, BPA-free bottle.

title: Approved structure reference
content: Bullets should cover material, temperature retention, portability, cleaning ease and sustainability angle.
